title: Pressure sensor
abstract: A pressure sensor apparatus includes: a plurality of pressure responsive chambers provided along a longitudinal dimension of the apparatus, and a pressure sensor device provided in each chamber which together provide a pressure profile in an anatomical cavity.
claims: Claims Claims 1 . A pressure sensor apparatus comprising: a plurality of pressure responsive chambers provided along a first dimension of the apparatus; and a pressure sensor device provided in each chamber. 2. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in claim 1 wherein the chambers are arranged successively along the first dimension such that the pressure sensor device may simultaneously sense pressure to thereby provide a pressure profile along the first dimension. 3. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in claim 1 or claim 2 wherein the first dimension comprises a longitudinal dimension of the apparatus. 4. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims wherein each chamber comprises at least one pressure transmitting wall. 5. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims wherein a pressure resistant barrier is provided between adjacent chambers. 6. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in claim 5 wherein the pressure resistant barrier is sufficient to substantially prevent pressure changes in one chamber affecting pressure in the adjacent chamber. 7. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims wherein each chamber is filled with a fluid whereby the pressure sensor device senses the pressure of the fluid in the chamber. 8. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in claim 7 wherein the fluid comprises air. 9. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims wherein the apparatus further comprises a data transfer apparatus to provide the sensed pressure from each sensor to a further apparatus. 10. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in claim 9 wherein the data transfer apparatus comprises a transmitter. 1 1 . A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims wherein the apparatus further comprises a retention contour for retaining the apparatus in an anatomical cavity in use. 12. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in claim 1 1 wherein the retention contour extends in a second dimension which is substantially transverse to the first dimension. 13. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in claim 1 1 or claim 12 wherein the retention contour comprises one or more ribs or wings dependent from the apparatus. 14. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims wherein the apparatus comprises an intra-abdominal pressure sensing device. 15. A pressure sensor apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims wherein the apparatus comprises an intra-vaginal device. 16. A method of measuring pressure in an anatomical cavity comprising simultaneously sensing pressure at a plurality of locations along a first dimension of the cavity and recording the sensed pressure measurements to provide a pressure profile. 17. A method as claimed in claim 16 further comprising repeating the method. 18. A method as claimed in claim 16 or claim 17 further comprising performing the method under different conditions imposed on the anatomical cavity. 19. Apparatus substantially as herein described with reference to the accompanying drawings. 20. A method substantially as herein described with reference to the accompanying drawings.
